## Pre-Review Gate

- [ ] Branch rebased onto current main
- [ ] PR body carries CDD Trace through step 7
- [ ] Tests present, or explicit reason none apply
- [ ] Every AC has evidence
- [ ] Known debt explicit
- [ ] Schema/shape audit completed (or N/A)
- [ ] Peer enumeration completed (or N/A)
- [ ] Harness audit completed (or N/A)
- [ ] Post-patch re-audit completed
- [ ] CI green on head commit (or draft pending CI)
